title: Neural dynamics sandbox versus frequency, recency and uniform-random baselines

split_policy.data_leakage_guard: At each holdout point, the neural readout, frequency scores and recency scores use only strictly earlier draws.

split.data_leakage_guard: At each holdout point, the neural readout, frequency scores and recency scores use only strictly earlier draws.

comparison.interpretation: The neural-dynamics sandbox did not pass the promotion gate on this historical holdout. It remains research-only and is not connected to ticket generation.

conclusion: The neural-dynamics sandbox did not pass the promotion gate on this historical holdout. It remains research-only and is not connected to ticket generation.
safe_note_bg: Това е изолиран исторически sandbox експеримент. Neural-dynamics моделът не е включен в production pipeline, не създава реални фишове и не доказва предвидимост на бъдещи случайни тиражи.
